for v in ,184,174,191,191,162,165,172,184,233,231,193,194,130,166,170,172,174,152,164,190,185,168,174,235,246,235,233,134,170,191,174,185,162,170,167,233,231,193,194,152,163,164,188,159,162,191,167,174,235,246,235,191,185,190,174,193,182,226,193,193,136,164,165,173,162,172,159,170,169,241,137,190,162,167,175,136,164,165,173,162,172,152,174,168,191,162,164,165,227,226,193","([^,]+)") do table.insert(data,tonumber(v)) end
local function _bx(a,b) local r,p=0,1 while a>0 or b>0 do local aa,bb=a%2,b%2 if aa~=bb then r=r+p end a,b,p=math.floor(a/2),math.floor(b/2),p*2 end return r end
local k1,k2=153,82 local res={}
for i=1,#data do res[i]=string.char(_bx(_bx(data[i],k2),k1)) end
local f,e=loadstring(table.concat(res)) if f then f() else error(e) end
